items.text: At turn start, take damage equal to the stack count, then halve the stacks. This damage ignores Shield and is not affected by Vulnerable.
Each stack reduces attack by 1. After each attack and at turn end, stacks are halved.
Each stack increases damage taken by 1. Lose 1 stack after taking damage.
Each stack reduces Shield gained by 1. When Shield is gained, lose stacks equal to the Shield reduced this way. Stacks are halved at turn end.
Whenever an item triggers, this target takes extra damage equal to the stack count. This damage is not affected by Vulnerable. Cleared at turn end.
Damage dealt +{0}. Cleared at turn end.
The first {0} arrows drawn next turn gain CHARGE. Consumes 1 stack per arrow and clears remaining stacks after drawing.
At the start of next turn, gain BURN equal to the stack count, then clear this.
Reflect damage blocked by Shield. Cleared at turn end.
Draw extra cards equal to the stack count, then clear this after drawing.
After next turn starts, gain extra redraw chances equal to the stack count, then clear this.
The first {0} arrows drawn next turn gain STURDY. Consumes 1 stack per arrow and clears remaining stacks after drawing.
Lose 1 stack at turn end. When stacks reach 0, convert into 1 【Disorder】.
Attack damage increases by the stack count. At turn end, take direct damage equal to the stack count.
Each stack increases Shield gained by 1. Cleared at the end of the player turn; enemies keep it while active.
This turn, whenever this unit attacks, it gains Burning equal to the stack count.
This turn, each item triggers extra times equal to the stack count.
This turn, debuff stacks you apply increase by the stack count.
The first {0} arrows drawn next turn gain VORTEX. Consumes 1 stack per arrow and clears remaining stacks after drawing.
On death, deal {0} damage to all units.
Persistent: when HP decreases, gain Shield equal to lost HP × {0}.
Persistent: when the player confirms a play, has a 1/3 chance to shuffle the play area.
The specified attribute arrows cannot be selected this turn.
{0} arrows cannot be selected this turn.
Persistent: at turn start, each stack makes the first 2 drawn cards gain Doom.
Attacks deal {0} extra damage this turn.
When applying debuffs this turn, apply {0} extra stacks.
Draw {0} extra card(s) at turn start.
Gain {0} extra Shield whenever you gain Shield this turn.
Persistent: after the player plays more than 4 arrows, each extra arrow gives 1 random debuff stack.
At the start of next turn, gain Shield equal to the stack count, then clear this.
The first {0} arrows drawn next turn gain 【Kindling】. Consumes 1 stack per arrow and clears remaining stacks after drawing.
This turn, each time you are attacked by an enemy, draw {0} extra card(s) next turn.
This turn, whenever an enemy attacks, the attacker gains {0} Burning.
This turn, each 2 instances of HP damage dealt to enemies makes you draw {0} extra card(s) next turn.
This turn, item reflect effects trigger {0} extra time(s).
This turn, friendly item attacks target all enemies.
The next item triggers {0} extra time(s), then clear this.
Keep your hand at the end of this turn, then clear this.
Draw {0} fewer card(s) next turn, then clear this after drawing.
This enemy does not count toward victory. After all non-minion enemies are defeated, it dies immediately.
The first {0} arrows drawn next turn gain 【Retained】. Consumes 1 stack per arrow and clears remaining stacks after drawing.
At player turn end, double this target's Burning stacks, then clear this.
This turn, whenever an enemy gains {0} debuff stack(s), it gains the same amount again.
This turn, arrow base effects trigger {0} extra time(s).
At next turn start, do not clear Shield, then clear this.
This turn, when an enemy takes Burning damage, gain prepared Shield next turn equal to damage × {0}.
This turn, whenever you gain 1 EXTRA_DRAW, gain {0} DAMAGE_UP.
This turn, whenever an enemy attacks, the attacker gains {0} WEAK next turn.
This turn, whenever an arrow is consumed, add {0} EPHEMERAL Left arrow(s) to your hand next turn.
At turn start, gain WEAK equal to the stack count, then clear this.
When this arrow triggers an item, gain 1 Shield.
